label: Special thing filter
description: Defines a special toggle in ThingFilter category trees, backed by a worker class that tests whether a Thing matches the filter.

parentCategory.label: Parent category
parentCategory.description: ThingCategoryDef whose tree node owns this special filter in storage, ingredient, apparel, food, and similar ThingFilter UIs.

saveKey.label: Save key
saveKey.description: Stable key used when saving this special filter's allowed/disallowed state in a ThingFilter.

allowedByDefault.label: Allowed by default
allowedByDefault.description: Whether this special filter starts allowed when a ThingFilter resolves its default allowances.

configurable.label: Configurable
configurable.description: Whether users can toggle this special filter in the ThingFilter UI.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class deriving from SpecialThingFilterWorker. The worker decides whether a concrete Thing matches this special filter.

basic-special-thing-filter.label: Basic special thing filter
basic-special-thing-filter.description: Special ThingFilter toggle with a category, save key, and worker class.
